# @mrmeg/expo-media

Docs for agents:

- README.md: install, server/client setup, app-wide defaults, processing,
  migration, security, validation.
- LLM_USAGE.md: concise import and implementation rules.
- llms-full.md: expanded package contract.

Public entrypoints:

- @mrmeg/expo-media
- @mrmeg/expo-media/client
- @mrmeg/expo-media/react-query
- @mrmeg/expo-media/processing
- @mrmeg/expo-media/processing/image-compression
- @mrmeg/expo-media/processing/image-compression/config
- @mrmeg/expo-media/processing/video-conversion
- @mrmeg/expo-media/processing/video-thumbnails
- @mrmeg/expo-media/server

Do not import server code from client entrypoints. Upload signing uses
mediaType plus contentType, not extension-only signing.
Client upload defaults are app-owned; keep them in one settings module and
choose named upload policies from screens.
Prefer granular processing entrypoints. The broad /processing barrel is for
compatibility and can pull all processing features into a bundler graph.
